text:
There was a man named Harold who loved mushrooms. He collected them everywhere. One rainy afternoon he decided to go mushroom hunting. He wandered far into an ancient forest that nobody had seen in years. As he explored deeper into the woods, strange whispers sounded behind him. His heart raced.

The whispers grew louder.

Turning around slowly, Harold saw a giant redwood owl perched high in the trees.

"Good day," said the owl.

Harold cautiously climbed towards the owl.

"Aren't you afraid? You're deep enough."

Harold laughed nervously.

"I love animals." Just then, a tiny frog bounced onto his shoulder.

"You want a ride? Just hop."

Harold liked frogs.

"You’re good fun!"

They flew silently south through the forest. After a time, the big owl turned and winked.

"Thanks."

"Just enjoy the journey."

They rested atop an ancient oak high above the forest floor.
